page_text: Official Aalto University admissions page for 2026/27 scholarships and tuition fees. Non-EU/EEA Master's applicants, including applicants from Sri Lanka, may apply. Artificial Intelligence programmes are included. Awards cover 50 to 100 percent of tuition. The application deadline is tied to the Master's admissions round.

rules.evidence_text: Official Aalto page states 2026/27 scholarships and tuition fees.
Official Aalto page says non-EU/EEA applicants may apply for scholarships.
Official Aalto page addresses international applicants applying through admissions.

rules.requirement_text: Applicant is liable for tuition fees.
rules.evidence_text: Official Aalto page says scholarships are for students liable for tuition fees.
Official Aalto page covers Master's admissions scholarships.
Official Aalto page lists technology and Artificial Intelligence Master's programmes in the scholarship scope.

rules.requirement_text: Award covers at least 40 percent funding need.
rules.evidence_text: Official Aalto page states awards cover 50 to 100 percent of tuition.
Official Aalto page ties the scholarship application to the 2026/27 Master's admissions round.
Official Aalto page says applicants request scholarship consideration inside the Master's admissions form.
